About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: Momentum-Ranker Dashboard Today's data reveals an extraordinary outlier in TNGX, which ranks #1 with a composite score of 98.0—driven by explosive 1-year returns of 962.71% and exceptional consistency across all timeframes (ratio passes: 5/5). TNGX trades above all major moving averages and dramatically outperforms SPY by 945.31% over one year, though its 1-day return of only 0.7% suggests the mega-move is historical rather than today's catalyst. The second-ranked ticker LINC shows much more moderate momentum with 167.13% 1-year returns and a 1.869 bad-spy-score—nearly double TNGX's 1.1478—indicating LINC exhibits greater volatility relative to market downturns. Both leaders pass all SMA gates and maintain positive ratio consistency, but TNGX's extreme divergence from typical market patterns warrants scrutiny as to whether this represents sustainable momentum or a potential reversion candidate.
